### Candidate items
1. **LangGraph ML Flows: Agentic Experimentation Framework**  
   URL: https://blog.langchain.dev/langgraph-ml-workflows/  
   Rationale: ML-specific orchestration patterns for experiment loops (HPO, evaluation, iteration), with a primary technical source.  
   Checklist: goal-directed ML planning; tool-using ML lifecycle execution; iterative feedback loop.

2. **FeatureForge: Agentic Feature Engineering Toolkit**  
   URL: https://github.com/featureforge-ai/featureforge  
   Rationale: Automates feature generation/extraction and reports measurable model performance gains.  
   Checklist: goal-directed ML planning; tool-using ML lifecycle execution; iterative feedback loop; empirical ML outcome.
